name: Playwright MCP
description_en: Browser-automation MCP server that lets agents drive Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit through Playwright—navigate, click, fill forms, and capture accessibility snapshots.
description_zh: 基于 Playwright 的浏览器自动化 MCP 服务,让智能体驱动 Chromium、Firefox 与 WebKit——导航、点击、填表、抓取可访问性快照。
long_en: Microsoft's official Playwright MCP server exposes structured browser control to MCP clients, using accessibility trees rather than screenshots so agents act on deterministic page structure.
long_zh: 微软官方的 Playwright MCP 服务向 MCP 客户端开放结构化的浏览器控制,基于可访问性树而非截图,让智能体在确定性的页面结构上操作。
sec_note_en: Controls a browser and can reach any URL; run against trusted targets and review before enabling.
sec_note_zh: 可控制浏览器并访问任意 URL;请对可信目标使用,启用前先审阅。
